red_test: go test ./internal/atlas -run 'TestRecommendationReadbackSchemaRequiresFoundryTerminalExamples|TestMissionRecommendationsImportBuildsDoubleSizeWaveAndWorkgraph' -count=1 failed before implementation because recommendation-readback.schema.json did not require foundry_terminal_status_examples.
summary: Focused tests now prove the schema requires structured Foundry terminal examples and generated readbacks describe promoted, denied, and blocked terminal behavior.
